missions.name: Fleet Performance
missions.objective: Improve fleet efficiency by 20% within 5 days
missions.strategy: Run A/B tests on slowest 2 agents, apply winning configs via performance-tuner

missions.name: Detection Coverage
missions.description: Create RCA signatures for undetected patterns
missions.objective: Create 3 new RCA signatures for undetected patterns
missions.strategy: Analyze unlinked incidents, cluster by similarity, generate RCA patterns

missions.name: Knowledge Integration
missions.objective: Apply top 3 learned patterns to production RCA signatures
missions.strategy: Promote shadow-mode signatures, update confidence thresholds
